candidates.title: Graphic Designer for Multi-Medium Work
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: We are seeking a creative, talented, and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating visually appealing designs that communicate ideas, enhance brand identity, and support marketing and business objectives. The Graphic Designer will work closely with clients, marketing teams, content creators, and other stakeholders to develop high-quality visual content for digital and print platforms. This role requires strong creative thinking, excellent design skills, and proficiency in industry-standard design software. The candidate should be able to transform concepts into compelling visual designs while maintaining consistency with brand guidelines and project requirements. ⸻ Key Responsibilities 1. Visual Design Creation * Develop creative and engaging graphic designs for various media platforms. * Create logos, brochures, flyers, poste

candidates.title: Optimize Instagram for Makeup Brand
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · InDesign · Illustrator — for multi-page layout and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I run Yara Makeover and my feed already displays the looks I create, but the profile itself isn’t converting viewers into booked bridal or party clients. I want to overhaul every touch-point a visitor sees the moment they land on my page—bio wording, contact buttons, call-to-action placement, link-in-bio flow—so it feels polished, on-brand, and impossible to leave without enquiring. Once those foundations are right, I’m keen to keep momentum with a clear content rhythm: reels that showcase transformations, captions that spark saves and shares, and hashtag sets that place me in front of brides-to-be. If you have beauty industry experience and can prove you’ve lifted similar accounts, show me the before-and-after results in your past work. Deliverables I expect: • A rewritten bio, headline, and username audit that positions me as the go-to bridal/party MUA in my city • Updated contact opti

candidates.title: Graphic Design Aligned with Brand Standards
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m looking for a skilled designer who can create fresh visual assets while staying strictly inside my existing brand guidelines. You’ll receive the full style guide—logo lock-ups, colour palette, typography rules, imagery tone, even sample layouts—and every piece you produce must fit seamlessly within that framework. The exact formats are still flexible. I may need anything from eye-catching social posts and web banners to printable one-pagers or presentation slides, so versatility is important. What matters most is that each design feels cohesive with the rest of the brand and is delivered on time. Please share: • Examples where you worked under established brand rules • Your preferred tools (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, Figma, etc.) • Typical turnaround for first drafts and revisions Final artwork should arrive as fully editable source files plus export-ready PNG, JPG or PDF, nam

candidates.title: Canva Expert for 80-Page Wellness Journal
candidates.tools: Photoshop · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: Canva Designer Needed – Premium 80-Page Wellness Journal/Workbook (A5) I am looking for an experienced Canva designer to professionally design an 80-page wellness journal/workbook called The 28-Day Reset. Brand colours and logo 4. Visual mock-up examples showing the exact design direction 5. Design brief outlining the required aesthetic Project Requirements 1. Design workbook in Canva 2. A5 portrait format with 3mm bleed 3. Approximately 80 pages 4. Create a consistent, professional layout throughout 5. Apply typography, spacing, writing sections, divider pages, reflection pages and quote boxes 6. Ensure all pages are print-ready and visually cohesive 7. Maintain consistency with supplied moc

candidates.title: Confluence Club Portal Refinement
candidates.brief: Our grassroots football club already has a Confluence space packed with governance documents, policies, procedures, role guides, forms, and a health & safety management system. The content is there, yet the overall experience still feels unfinished. I need a Confluence specialist to review what exists, streamline the structure, and present everything as a polished, club-branded portal that our committee members, coaches, and volunteers can navigate intuitively. Here is what I’m looking for you to do: • Audit the current pages and hierarchy, identify duplication or gaps, and propose an improved layout that keeps information role-specific and easy to reach. • Apply visual consistency—templates, style sheets, macros, and our colour palette—so every page looks like part of the same club presence. • Optimise navigation and search (labels, shortcuts, landing pages) while keeping permissions si

candidates.title: Experienced Amazon Lister
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for layered/retouched assets and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I’m expanding my Amazon catalogue with a new line of pets and home-ware products and need a seasoned Amazon lister who can handle the entire process—from creating the listings in Seller Central to writing conversion-focused copy. Here’s what I’m counting on you for: • Build and publish each listing in Seller Central, selecting the correct category nodes and variation structure. • Craft keyword-rich titles, bullet points, descriptions and backend search terms that comply with Amazon style guides and boost organic visibility. • Optimise images (I’ll supply the raw photos) by adding infographics or lifestyle text call-outs where they can help conversion. • Monitor for listing errors or suppressed SKUs and fix them quickly. All product descriptions still need to be written, so strong product-copy skills and familiarity with keyword research tools such as Helium 10 or Jungle Scout are essenti
